sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ هُنَاكَ عُصْفُورَةٌ صَغِيرَةٌ فَقَدَتْ طَرِيقَهَا إِلَى عُشِّهَا.
sentences.translation: Bila je mala vrapčica koja je izgubila put do svog gnijezda.
sentences.translationEn: There was a small sparrow who lost her way back to her nest.

sentences.arabic: طَارَتْ يَمِينًا وَيَسَارًا وَلَمْ تَجِدِ الْمَكَانَ.
sentences.translation: Letjela je lijevo i desno ali nije pronašla to mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: She flew right and left but did not find the place.

sentences.arabic: سَمِعَتْ أَصْوَاتَ أَفْرَاخِهَا فِي الشَّجَرَةِ الْكَبِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Čula je glasove svojih pilića u velikom stablu.
sentences.translationEn: She heard the voices of her chicks in the big tree.

sentences.arabic: طَارَتْ نَحْوَ الصَّوْتِ وَوَجَدَتْ عُشَّهَا وَأَفْرَاخَهَا.
sentences.translation: Poletjela je prema glasovima i pronašla je gnijezdo i pilenike.
sentences.translationEn: She flew toward the sound and found her nest and her chicks.
